SEARCH
Package com.example.cmput301_app.model

Class LotteryPool

java.lang.Object
com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
public class LotteryPool extends Object
Represents the lottery pool for an event in the application. A LotteryPool manages the selection process for an event by randomly drawing entrants from the event's waiting list. It tracks which entrants have been selected, declined, or cancelled, and supports replacement draws when a previously selected entrant declines or is cancelled. This class handles only the local state of the lottery. All persistence of selection results to Firebase is handled by LotteryDB. Outstanding issues: - Draw logic assumes the waiting list passed in has already excluded previously selected, declined, and cancelled entrants. Filtering responsibility currently falls on the caller.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LotteryPool()
    Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.
    LotteryPool(int drawSize)
    Constructs a LotteryPool with a specified draw size.

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    cancelEntrant(String deviceId)
    Moves an entrant from the selected list to the cancelled list.

    Moves an entrant from the selected list to the declined list.

    Randomly selects up to drawSize entrants from the provided waiting list.
    String
    drawReplacement(List<String> waitingListIds)
    Randomly selects one replacement entrant from the provided waiting list.
    List<String>
    getCancelledEntrantIds()
    Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who were cancelled by the organizer.
    List<String>
    getDeclinedEntrantIds()
    Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who declined their invitation.
    int
    getDrawSize()
    Returns the number of entrants to sample in a lottery draw.

    Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who have been selected.

  • Constructor Details

    • LotteryPool

      public LotteryPool()
      Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.

    • LotteryPool

      public LotteryPool(int drawSize)
      Constructs a LotteryPool with a specified draw size.
      Parameters:
      drawSize - the number of entrants to sample from the waiting list

  • Method Details

    • drawEntrants

      public List<String> drawEntrants(List<String> waitingListIds)
      Randomly selects up to drawSize entrants from the provided waiting list. If the waiting list has fewer entrants than drawSize, all entrants are selected. Selected entrants are added to the selectedEntrantIds list.
      Parameters:
      waitingListIds - the list of device IDs currently on the waiting list
      Returns:
      a list of device IDs that were selected in this draw

    • drawReplacement

      public String drawReplacement(List<String> waitingListIds)
      Randomly selects one replacement entrant from the provided waiting list. The selected entrant is added to the selectedEntrantIds list. Returns null if the waiting list is empty.
      Parameters:
      waitingListIds - the list of device IDs remaining on the waiting list
      Returns:
      the device ID of the replacement entrant, or null if none are available

    • selectEntrant

      public void selectEntrant(String deviceId)
      Marks an entrant as selected by adding them to the selected list. Does nothing if the entrant is already selected.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to select

    • declineEntrant

      public void declineEntrant(String deviceId)
      Moves an entrant from the selected list to the declined list. Does nothing if the entrant is not in the selected list.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant who declined

    • cancelEntrant

      public void cancelEntrant(String deviceId)
      Moves an entrant from the selected list to the cancelled list. Does nothing if the entrant is not in the selected list.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to cancel

    • isSelected

      public boolean isSelected(String deviceId)
      Returns whether a given entrant is currently in the selected list.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant is selected, false otherwise

    • hasDeclined

      public boolean hasDeclined(String deviceId)
      Returns whether a given entrant has declined their invitation.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant has declined, false otherwise

    • isCancelled

      public boolean isCancelled(String deviceId)
      Returns whether a given entrant has been cancelled.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant has been cancelled, false otherwise

    • getSelectedEntrantIds

      public List<String> getSelectedEntrantIds()
      Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who have been selected.
      Returns:
      list of selected entrant device IDs

    • setSelectedEntrantIds

      public void setSelectedEntrantIds(List<String> selectedEntrantIds)
      Sets the list of device IDs of entrants who have been selected.
      Parameters:
      selectedEntrantIds - the list of selected device IDs to assign

    • getDeclinedEntrantIds

      public List<String> getDeclinedEntrantIds()
      Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who declined their invitation.
      Returns:
      list of declined entrant device IDs

    • setDeclinedEntrantIds

      public void setDeclinedEntrantIds(List<String> declinedEntrantIds)
      Sets the list of device IDs of entrants who declined their invitation.
      Parameters:
      declinedEntrantIds - the list of declined device IDs to assign

    • getCancelledEntrantIds

      public List<String> getCancelledEntrantIds()
      Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who were cancelled by the organizer.
      Returns:
      list of cancelled entrant device IDs

    • setCancelledEntrantIds

      public void setCancelledEntrantIds(List<String> cancelledEntrantIds)
      Sets the list of device IDs of entrants who were cancelled by the organizer.
      Parameters:
      cancelledEntrantIds - the list of cancelled device IDs to assign

    • getDrawSize

      public int getDrawSize()
      Returns the number of entrants to sample in a lottery draw.
      Returns:
      the draw size

    • setDrawSize

      public void setDrawSize(int drawSize)
      Sets the number of entrants to sample in a lottery draw.
      Parameters:
      drawSize - the draw size to assign
